headline: Both Sides Cite Same Study, Opposite Conclusions
context: The World Bank published its 142-page Malaysia Economic Monitor on 19 March 2026. Government and opposition both quoted it within hours.

cards.big: Government says success. Opposition says crisis.
cards.sub: Both quoting real numbers. Neither quoting the report's actual conclusion.

cards.big: Chapter 4 was not cited by anyone in 72 hours.
cards.sub: The central finding: productivity stagnation. It implicates every administration.

cards.big: Both statements came within 2 hours. It's 142 pages.
Same finding in every report since 2018. Nobody acts.
cards.sub: It implicates everyone, so it interests no one.

cards.big: The most important finding is the one nobody discusses.
Issues that implicate everyone get ignored by everyone.
